name: FPPB
short_description: Creative first-person image browser with FPS-style image controls, capable of loading hundreds of images simultaneously and supporting mainstream image formats. Features spatial layout saving and decal statistics. Also supports playing video files.
detailed_description:
Creative First-Person Image Browser

You can load images from your hard drive and interact with them using first-person shooter (FPS)-style controls.

Supports loading hundreds of images simultaneously for browsing in a virtual space. For example, a modern graphics card with 4GB of video memory can typically load 100 1K-resolution images at once. If compression mode is enabled, it can load hundreds simultaneously.

Also supports playing video files in the scene.

Player controls: Walk, run, crouch, jump.

Image operations: Grab, view, place, throw, apply decals.

Save/Load support: Both the placement positions of images and the applied decals can be saved and loaded.

Decal statistics: Usage of decals will generate a statistical report and save it to disk.

Software usage scenarios:

Image selection: When you need to select appropriate images from a large collection, load them all into the software. Mark favorite or unwanted images with different decals, then save. The software will generate a decal statistics report in the save directory, listing the names and paths of the images you marked.

Comic browsing: You can load comics into the virtual space and view them. Arrange the pages in any spatial position you like, interact with them by adding decals to express your mood, and you can save and load at any time. This way of reading comics is refreshing.

Watching short films: In addition to operating images, you can also browse video files stored on your hard drive. Enjoy short films and images simultaneously.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Russian, Japanese, Korean, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Danish, Ukrainian, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Indonesian, Turkish, Greek, Norwegian, Czech, Polish, Thai, Swedish, Romanian, Finnish, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Vietnamese, Simplified Chinese
